data_description.address: Select the Bluetooth device to set up.

device_not_found.message: Could not find Bluetooth device with address `{address}`.

upload_image.description: Uploads an image to an OpenDisplay device.

dither_mode.description: The dithering algorithm to use for converting the image to the display's color palette.
dither_mode.name: Dither mode

fit_mode.description: How the image is fitted to the display dimensions.
fit_mode.name: Fit mode

image.description: The image to upload to the displays.
image.name: Image

refresh_mode.description: The display refresh mode. Full refresh clears ghosting but is slower. Fast refresh is not supported on all displays.
refresh_mode.name: Refresh mode

rotation.description: The rotation angle in degrees, applied clockwise.
rotation.name: Rotation

tone_compression.description: Dynamic range compression strength. Leave empty for automatic.
tone_compression.name: Tone compression

upload_image.name: Upload image
